title: Random Structure Every Minute
description: This datapack generates a random structure every minute, which can lead to interesting experiences
body:
## A Crazy Minecraft Datapack!
Once you load into the world, a timer will be displayed above your hotbar counting down from 60. 
When the timer reaches 0, a **random structure** will spawn!

![structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f855ba0e3d6066b292631f1188e9244ee6b8ca9.jpeg)

If the timer doesn't automatically start, or doesn't appear, run the following command: **_/function #minecraft:load_**

### Please Report Any Issues To Me At: [https://github.com/Fitres-is-a-cat/random-structures/issues](https://github.com/Fitres-is-a-cat/random-structures/issues)
